word: G2436 - ἵλεως - híleōs - hil'-eh-oce - Be it far

sections.paragraph: சுருக்க விளக்கம் / Short Definition: Be it far
இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Adjective / பெயரடை

ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: Perhaps from the alternate form of G138; cheerful (as attractive), that is, propitious; adverbially (by Hebraism) God be gracious!, that is, (in averting some calamity) far be it: - be it far, merciful.
